interview.title: Technical Interview
interview.noAttempt: No attempt found. Please start an evaluation from the dashboard.
interview.welcomeDescription: You will have a conversational interview with our AI. Answer naturally, as you would with a human interviewer.
interview.tip1: Be specific and give concrete examples
interview.tip2: Don't hesitate to ask for clarification
interview.tip3: Take time to think before answering
interview.completedDescription: Your interview has been submitted for evaluation. You will receive your Proof Profile by email.
interview.timedOutDescription: The time limit has been reached. Your answers have been submitted automatically.
interview.evaluationProcessing: Your interview is being evaluated. You will receive your Proof Profile shortly.
interview.endConfirmDescription: Once ended, your answers will be submitted for evaluation and you won't be able to modify them.
interview.inputHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line
